title: PayPal Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results
note: Primary source for FY 2025 total payment volume, revenue, operating income, net income, free cash flow, and business commentary.

title: PayPal (PYPL) - Market capitalization
note: Market capitalization source used for the refreshed market cap metric.

title: Enterprise Payments | PayPal for Enterprises
note: Product source for PayPal's enterprise payment platform and merchant payment capabilities.

title: All-In-One Payment App | Digital Wallet
note: Product source for PayPal's consumer digital wallet and send/receive positioning.

title: What is Venmo and how does it work?
note: Official PayPal help page describing Venmo as a U.S. social payment service for friends, family, and businesses.

title: Pay Friends | Payments App
note: Product source for Venmo consumer payment and checkout use cases.

title: BTCPay Server GitHub repository
note: Primary open-source source for BTCPay Server's license, self-hosted architecture, Bitcoin and Lightning support, and merchant payment features.

title: GNU Taler
note: Protocol source for privacy-preserving free software digital cash and merchant payment design.

title: Cashu - Open-source Ecash
note: Protocol source for open-source Bitcoin e-cash, Lightning interoperability, wallet applications, and private bearer-token transfers.

title: The Cashu Protocol
note: Technical source for Cashu's blind-signature protocol and token verification model.

title: Fedimint
note: Technical source for open-source federated Bitcoin e-cash, community custody, private payments, and Lightning/on-chain interoperability.
